ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "also_known_as" TEXT /* Also known as name of the company */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of the company (e.g., Inc., Ltd., Corp.) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "business_description" TEXT /* Description of the company's business */,
  "incorporation_date" TEXT /* Date the company was incorporated */,
  "dissolution_date" TEXT /* Date the company was dissolved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the company (e.g., Active, Inactive, Dissolved) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the company record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the address belongs to */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of the address (e.g., Head Office, Branch Office) */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the address */,
  "town" TEXT /* Town or city */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province or state */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Flag indicating the primary address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the contact belongs to */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of the contact (e.g., CEO, CFO) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the contact */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the document belongs to */,
  "document_category" TEXT /* Category of the document (e.g., Certificate of Incorporation, Business License) */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document */,
  "document_number" TEXT /* Number of the document */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the document was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the document expires */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating the active document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the status belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the company (e.g., Active, Inactive, Dissolved) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the status became effective */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or reasons for the status change */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who updated the status */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statuses_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Administrator, Compliance Officer, Public) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of the user (e.g., Administrator, Compliance Officer, Public) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating the active user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., View, Edit, Delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_deadlines" (
  "deadline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deadline */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the deadline belongs to */,
  "deadline_date" TEXT /* Date the deadline occurs */,
  "deadline_type" TEXT /* Type of deadline (e.g., Annual Report, License Renewal) */,
  "deadline_category" TEXT /* Category of the deadline (e.g., Annual Report, License Renewal) */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating the completed deadline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deadline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_deadlines_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the communication belongs to */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date the communication occurred */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., Email, Letter) */,
  "communication_category" TEXT /* Category of the communication (e.g., Email, Letter) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating the read communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the analytic belongs to */,
  "analytic_date" TEXT /* Date the analytic occurred */,
  "analytic_type" TEXT /* Type of analytic (e.g., Business Trend, Compliance Rate) */,
  "analytic_category" TEXT /* Category of the analytic (e.g., Business Trend, Compliance Rate) */,
  "is_processed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating the processed analytic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "SETTINGS" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
